results.title: Netflix free trial vs. Prime: Which one is actually free?
results.description: Netflix has ended its free trial, while Prime Video still offers a 30‐day free entry. Compare carrier bundles vs. Amazon’s easy sign‐up to see which stream stays truly free. The post Netflix free trial vs. Prime: Which one is actually free? appeared first on Film Daily .

results.title: AT&T Launches Unlimited Day Pass, Bringing Connectivity to iPad Users Regardless of Carrier
results.description: What’s the News: Today, AT&T launched Unlimited Day Pass, a 24-hour unlimited wireless data1 connection for eligible U.S. iPad users, including non-AT&T customers, for a daily2 *$3 flat rate — with no contracts, subscriptions or credit checks required. AT&T is the first and only major U.S. wireless provider to give eligible iPad users (with eSIM capabilities) the freedom to buy [...]
